jp.text: エイ！エイ！オオオオオオ！

3827759.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B
3827759.transcript: They won't be so lucky next time!

jp.literal: What kind of torture is this?

4431268.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
4431268.transcript: Aha! Wherever we tread, the scent of blood follows!

jp.text: ん？やはり俺と似た修羅の匂いがするま。
jp.literal: Hmph. You've got the scent of a warrior just like me.

6238313.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
6238313.transcript: Starsword Sovereign! I demand a deathmatch!

jp.text: 転生拳を教えて！試合をしようぜ！
jp.literal: Teach me the way of the sword, and let's have a match!
I've got it perfectly locked in!

17769751.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
17769751.transcript: You got it! Using my indoor voice for the sniper!

jp.text: ムハハハハ！了解了解！控えめに楽しむぜ！
jp.literal: Hahahaha! Understood! Let's keep it cool and enjoy this!

17864026.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
17864026.transcript: Back to bed with ya, big guy!

jp.text: こいつを壊したら終わりかあ！
jp.literal: If I break this thing, it's over, huh?

19445347.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
19445347.transcript: What a coincidence! I was just thinking the same thing!

jp.text: 奇遇だなあ。俺もこっからだったのよ。
jp.literal: What a coincidence! I was aiming for that spot too!
I don't need to be told that!

21935322.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
21935322.transcript: That can't be all I've got!

jp.text: どうした！動きが鈍ってきてんぞ！

26018147.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
26018147.transcript: Nothing to it! I said I'd pull my weight, and I always keep my word!

jp.text: カマワンサー、今は協力させてもらう身だからな。
jp.literal: I'm counting on you, Rosetta. We're going to have to work together for now.

26564497.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
26564497.transcript: Ugh! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! My blood sings with the thrill of battle!

jp.text: ムハハハ！まだまだ暴れ足りねーぞ！
jp.literal: Hahahaha! I'm not done rampaging yet!

31253969.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
31253969.transcript: Thought the alpha wolf couldn't hunt with a pack, did ya?

jp.text: ドトウの連携だ！ビックラこいっただろ！
jp.literal: It's a double combo! You're surprised, aren't you?

43004653.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
43004653.transcript: Yes! The fun never stops, does it!

jp.text: おう！まだまだ楽しもうぜ！
jp.literal: Oh! Let's have some more fun!

43667513.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
43667513.transcript: Don't throw in the towel on me, Swordveil!

jp.text: はがされねえ！降参なんかしてくれんねえよ！
jp.literal: I'm not gonna let you get away with this! Don't you dare try to run!

jp.text: バザラガ！なかなかやるね！

50550291.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_yay_3
50550291.transcript: I love it! Ha ha ha ha ha!

jp.text: 最高だあああ！ハハハハハハハハハハ！

52548995.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
52548995.transcript: Show me you ain't afraid of death!

jp.text: どうした！死ぬ気で来いや！
jp.literal: What's wrong? Come at me with everything you've got!

57723823.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
57723823.transcript: I've heard you turn into a dragon. That true or uh...

jp.text: ところで、竜の姿になれるってのは本当か？
jp.literal: By the way, is it really true that you can take the form of a dragon?

58434642.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
58434642.transcript: Back boy! It's far too dangerous on the front lines!

jp.text: ぬっ！危ねえから俺に近づくなつってんだろ！
jp.literal: I told you to stay away from me 'cause it's dangerous!

58538380.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
58538380.transcript: Haha! Good work! Let's bring 'em the finale!

jp.text: んふふふ、いいね！このまま突破だ！
jp.literal: Hahahaha! Great! Let's keep breaking through!

jp.text: あおっし！今のは俺の勝ちだな！

64019084.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
64019084.transcript: We are who we are. That's just how the world works!

jp.text: そりゃお前、ガランツァだからに決まってんだろ！
jp.literal: Of course, that's why I'm Gallanza!

jp.text: そろそろぶっ壊れそうじゃねえか！
jp.literal: Looks like it's about to break apart!

65979750.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
65979750.transcript: My hands are trembling! This... this has never happened before!

jp.text: 手の震えが止まらねえ…俺の体は、何を感じ取ってやがる！
jp.literal: My hands won't stop shaking... What is my body sensing?

66292683.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
66292683.transcript: All will be crushed beneath my spear!

67180086.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
67180086.transcript: Make way, little pissants! Hurricane Gallanza comin' through!

jp.text: フッ飛ばされたくなけりゃ踏ん張っとけよ！
jp.literal: I don't wanna get blown away, so I'll just stand my ground!

jp.text: ラシクネーな！ハガサレノ！
jp.literal: You're not acting like yourself, Maglielle!

jp.text: んははは、最高にゾクゾクくらあ！
jp.literal: Hahahaha! This is the most exhilarating!

77145316.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
77145316.transcript: Then let's see what they're made of!

jp.text: ノーレ！お手並み拝見とゆこうか！
jp.literal: Alright, let's go see the fireworks!

77942726.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
77942726.transcript: Ever wanted to fly? I'll show you what it's like!

jp.text: ジャマなモンは全部ブッ飛ばす!
jp.literal: I'll blow everything that gets in my way to bits!

80963946.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
80963946.transcript: Nice! Nice! I think you meant impeccable!

jp.text: ああ、最強の追撃！の間違いだろう？
jp.literal: Huh? You mean the strongest pursuit, right?

81212604.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL2500_2
81212604.transcript: Whoa ho ho! Don't see a show like THAT every day!

jp.text: おお、派手にやられたもんだね！
jp.literal: Huh? You got wrecked in style, huh?

jp.text: 連携ってのはこうやんだよ！

84113023.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
84113023.transcript: One day I'll get you in a deathmatch, Astral. Mark my words!

jp.text: あの星の民との試合、ワクワクするよな。
jp.literal: This match against the people of the stars is exciting, isn't it?

84446346.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
84446346.transcript: I live for the sport! And nothing else!

85756374.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
85756374.transcript: Something tells me you'd take me to school instead!

jp.text: お前の方こそそこが知れないがな
jp.literal: You're the one who doesn't know your limits.

86473801.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
86473801.transcript: Makes it easy to pluck out all the weeds in one go!

jp.text: 沈んだところを一網打尽てな！
jp.literal: I'll take that sinking spot and drive it home!

87031894.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
87031894.transcript: This mountain of bricks is comin' down now!

jp.text: ハーデにぶっ壊してやるぜ！

89177244.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
89177244.transcript: Face me, Black Dragon! I demand a deathmatch!

jp.text: さあ！六竜の古風、試合をしようぜ！
jp.literal: Alright! Let's have a six-lane battle!

90497230.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_1
90497230.transcript: Bit off more than you could chew, huh?

jp.text: いいもんくらちまったら！
勝つのはいつだってギャランツ様よ！
jp.literal: I'll always be the one to win!

jp.text: ライデンのエラディヘート！
ムハハハハ！焼き尽くしてやる！
jp.literal: I'll burn you to a crisp!

103239320.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
103239320.transcript: Haha! As expected of young Leer's guardian!

jp.text: やるねえ！さすがはルリボウの騎士様だ！
jp.literal: You're something else! As expected of the knight of the Luribor!

104759373.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
104759373.transcript: Wrong, all wrong! I have seniority!

jp.text: 逆だ逆！お前が俺についてこい！
jp.literal: It's the opposite! You follow me!

107979849.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
107979849.transcript: Tweyen of the Eternals! I challenge you!

jp.text: 十点シュート！試合をしようぜ！
jp.literal: Ten-point shootout, Thorne! Let's have a match!

jp.text: 気合い入れて行けよ！ジイ様！

120756674.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
120756674.transcript: Well done, child! You can join me for the next attack!

jp.text: よくやったお前らしい！次も合わせてみろや！
jp.literal: Good job, Io! Let's try the next one!

122021082.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
122021082.transcript: It's easy! Give it a Hah! Sprint like crazy then Hup! And you're off!

jp.text: ああん？しょんべんんってどどどーん！足してバーンって乗るだけよ！
jp.literal: Huh? I just do Dashing Lancer, Martial Spear, Impale, Cyclone Skullsplitter, Eye of the Storm, Explosive Plunge, Deathmatch Finale, Tip of the Spear, and Storming Death!

jp.text: 攻めて攻めて攻めまくれ！

127291974.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
127291974.transcript: Sharp instincts! I can appreciate that!

jp.text: 鋭い投手、いいじゃねえか

127787571.label: PL2400_vo_ATK_ability_9_3
127787571.transcript: Behold! The fangs of the silver wolves!

jp.text: ハクロウノキバワムテキダァ！
この俺こそがガランツァだ！

132479554.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
132479554.transcript: Says the woman with the cutthroat look in her eyes!

jp.text: と言いながら、情けをかけているようには見えねえな。
jp.literal: You don't exactly look like you're begging for mercy.

134966353.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
134966353.transcript: Sure I do! I just like my way better!

jp.text: むしろ一番槍と評してほしいがな
jp.literal: I'd rather you just go all out and hit me with your best spear.

jp.text: ムハッ！ブチかましてやったぜ！
jp.literal: Hah! I really went all out!

138303619.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
138303619.transcript: Let me show you how it's done!

138372628.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
138372628.transcript: That was nothing! I go beyond deadly!

jp.text: まだまだ！こんなもんじゃねー！
jp.literal: Not bad! But this isn't even the real deal!

140731512.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
140731512.transcript: Yes! Now you've got me fired up!

jp.text: なるほどなるほどなるほどねー！
jp.literal: I see, I see, I see!

143437028.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
143437028.transcript: Strange, though. Did something drive it mad?

jp.text: 妙だな。何か狙ってやがんのか？
jp.literal: This is hopeless. Are you aiming for something?

143750786.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
143750786.transcript: Good! We were in perfect sync!

jp.text: よし！うまく合わせられたな！
jp.literal: Alright! If we can sync up well...

144176292.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
144176292.transcript: I'm even better now! I've left that version of me in the dust!

jp.text: あの頃よりも強いぜ。今のガランツァはよ。
jp.literal: I'm stronger than back then. This is the current Gallanza.

151749918.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
151749918.transcript: Enter MY territory and you get cut down!

jp.text: 近づく奴ら、全部なぎ払うぜ！
jp.literal: I'll clear out everyone who gets close!

152269242.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
152269242.transcript: Nice shot! What do you say to a deathmatch?

jp.text: ところで、お前は俺と試合しないのか？
jp.literal: By the way, aren't you going to have a match with me?

152993988.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
152993988.transcript: Hah! Gotta keep pace with the mighty Eternals!

jp.text: ふん、十天衆には負けらんねぇからよ。
jp.literal: Hmph. I'm not gonna lose to a ten-point rookie.

153729882.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
153729882.transcript: So, after we're done here... Deathmatch?

jp.literal: After this, how about a one-on-one match?

jp.text: ワラシはウシロニサガッテナ！
はがされろ！来てくれるって信じてたぜ！

164626583.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
164626583.transcript: Id! Reject the dragon, or it'll consume you!

jp.text: イドボ！龍神火を解け！ノマレンゾ！
jp.literal: I won't let you get past my Dragon's Gate!

165279666.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
165279666.transcript: From a tremor like that? Weak!

jp.literal: There's still a long way to go!

165433186.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
165433186.transcript: Would you mind a deathmatch? I'm ready anytime!

jp.text: 今ここで試合しても俺は構わないんだが？
jp.literal: I don't mind if we have a match right here and now.

166321184.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_lockon_3
166321184.transcript: The Silver Wolf Alpha has found his prey!

jp.text: 天覇無敵の鬼武僧！拳山！
jp.literal: The invincible demon warrior of the heavens! Kenzan!

172026270.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
172026270.transcript: I expect more results like that!

jp.text: ガランツァだすガランツァは！やっぱりガランツァだよな！
jp.literal: Gallanza's got Gallanza's style! He's definitely Gallanza!

176290157.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
176290157.transcript: And that was the Gallanza Especial!

jp.text: スペシャルガランツァリンクスペシャルだ！
この程度は朝飯前ってな！
jp.literal: I'll take that as a compliment!

jp.text: ムハハハハハハハハハハ！
あっはっはっはっは！ちげーね！
jp.literal: Heh heh heh! I'm not losing!

185827461.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_lockon_5
185827461.transcript: And here I was itchin' to go all out!

jp.text: 全力を出しても構わねぇんだよな！
jp.literal: I don't care even if I use all my power!

jp.text: アースデトネーション！
んー、どっこいしょっと。

190070469.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
190070469.transcript: Six reps! One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six!

jp.text: さーて、一、二、三、四、五、六、へい！
jp.literal: Thirty-one, two, three, four, five, six, seven...
I'm sorry, but I can't provide the requested translation.

191870949.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
191870949.transcript: More! I've yet to have my fill!

jp.text: ふぅ…まだまだ暴れ足んねえな！
jp.literal: Hmph. You're still not done running wild!

jp.text: シコグロぜー！イドボー！

198630031.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2500_3
198630031.transcript: Still not safe! Still not sorry!

199214899.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
199214899.transcript: Huh. It seems someone's compensating for their size with strength!

jp.text: ふむ、その願いがお前の強さの源ってわけか。
jp.literal: Hmph. So that wish is the source of your strength, is it?

200018900.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
200018900.transcript: Come on! Give me a real fight!

jp.text: おら！まだまだ足んねーぞ！
この物騒なもんが星神様だ？冗談じゃねえ！
jp.literal: You call that thing a god? That's no joke!

jp.text: ウラウラウラウラ！ドッカイショ！
jp.literal: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Let's go!

206656423.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1900_1
206656423.transcript: Come on, Eid! That ain't enough to kill ya!

jp.text: イド坊！まだ倒れねえよな！
jp.literal: Ido! You're still not going down!
This is exactly what I'm talking about!

209604110.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
209604110.transcript: Bring me a real challenge! That's an order!

jp.text: アサメシマエニモオ！マラシネ！
jp.literal: I'll show you what I can do!

212117767.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
212117767.transcript: Monster versus Wolf! A battle for the ages!

jp.text: 魔物だろうがなんだろうが関係ねえ！一緒に楽しもうぜ！
jp.literal: I don't care if you're a demon or not! Let's have some fun together!

jp.text: 何の因果かお前らと共闘することになるとはなあ
jp.literal: I never thought I'd have to fight you guys.

219080602.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
219080602.transcript: Heh heh heh heh heh! Ha!

220389320.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
220389320.transcript: The way you fight... so brutal! I love it!

jp.text: いいね！お前の戦い方、嫌いじゃねえ！
jp.literal: Nice! I don't hate your fighting style.

221124525.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
221124525.transcript: Muhahaha! You've got soul, swordsman! I respect that!

jp.text: ムハハハ！これが剣の掟の真髄か！面白い！
jp.literal: Hahahaha! So this is the true essence of the sword's master! How fascinating!

222338605.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
222338605.transcript: Watch it, smug mouth! I could snap you like a twig!

jp.text: おい！ニヤけづら！どこの目線から言ってやがる！
jp.literal: Hey! You two-faced bastard! What right have you got to talk?
Leave the next one to me!

223269832.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
223269832.transcript: Oho! Pass some of that burning spirit my way!

jp.text: いいね！その勢いでさらに楽しもうぜ！
jp.literal: Nice! Let's have even more fun with that momentum!

jp.text: よし、こら！完璧だったぜ！

jp.literal: I raised my hand, didn't I!

231295884.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
231295884.transcript: Let's begin! One! Two! Three! Four! Piece of cake!

jp.text:
いくぜー！
ヘイ！
ヘッ！
一！
二！
三！
四！
五！
ヘヘヘ！
余裕余裕！
jp.literal: Let's go! One, two, three, four! Easy!

232148976.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
232148976.transcript: If only I could fight all the Eternals to the death!

jp.text: ああ、いつか十天使全員と試合をしてみてぇ
jp.literal: I wanna have a match with all the Decemvirate one day.

236176489.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
236176489.transcript: Hah hah hah! Don't just stand there, Supreme Primarch!

jp.text: むはははは、ぼっとしてんなよ！天使長さんよ！
jp.literal: Hahahaha! You're spacing out, aren't you, little angel?

237415230.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
237415230.transcript: I wasn't headed to the monastery! Yep, flew right past it!

jp.text: 聖堂を目指すんじゃねえ！俺が目指した先に聖堂があんだよ！
jp.literal: I'm not aiming for justice. Justice is what I'm aiming for!

241360678.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
241360678.transcript: All that matters is the last team standing!

jp.text: おまえら、まだまだいけんだろ！
jp.literal: You guys! You can still go, right!

241363369.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
241363369.transcript: Damn right! Ha ha ha ha!

jp.text: ああ、イド。何だよ、急に呼びかけて。何か用か？

jp.literal: I'm sorry, but I can't provide the requested translation.

244982931.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
244982931.transcript: You wanted power! You got power!

jp.text: 力こそパワーだからな！
ようやくあったまってきたぜ！

245161156.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
245161156.transcript: We've battles left to fight, Commander!

jp.text: さーて次だ！剥がされろ！

246659180.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
246659180.transcript: My gut's tellin' me you ain't strong enough to win. Not yet.

jp.text: 今のお前では勝てねえよ！俺の直感がそう囁いてんだ！
jp.literal: You can't win against me now. My instincts are telling me so.

247567820.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
247567820.transcript: You're a grade-A pain in the ass, you know that?

jp.text: あきらめのおわるさは一級品だな！

249751024.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1900_2
249751024.transcript: Hey! Pick on someone your own size! Me!

jp.text: おまえの相手はこのおれだ！

251083976.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
251083976.transcript: Heh heh heh heh! Really was a thing of beauty, wasn't it?

jp.text: ハハハ！完璧にパーフェクトだったよな！
jp.literal: Hahahaha! That was perfectly perfect, wasn't it!
